summary: A Go-based monolithic test runner integrating MCP handlers and Goss migration with an extensive, partially auto-generated test suite.
concerns: Build failure in agent 0011 due to undefined TestResult type
High volume of auto-generated extra tests (agents 0005-0025) inflating codebase
1 staged file indicates uncommitted work during analysis
Potential test flakiness or fragility given the massive 782 test count
suggestions: Fix the undefined TestResul... build error in the TAP reporter
Consolidate or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents generated test directories
Commit or stash the staged changes to maintain a clean working tree
Review runner.go for performance bottlenecks given the heavy test load
